description.zh: 收录中央重要讲话、规划、政策解读和部门发布。
description.en: Central speeches, plans, policy interpretations, and ministerial releases.

description.zh: 整理涉外法律、行政法规、司法解释和重要立法动态。
description.en: Laws, regulations, judicial interpretations, and legislative updates involving foreign-related matters.

description.zh: 汇集条约数据库、国际组织规则和中国参与国际法治的资料。
description.en: Treaty databases, international organization materials, and China's participation in international rule of law.

description.zh: 聚焦涉外审判、仲裁、调解、执法和企业出海合规案例。
description.en: Foreign-related adjudication, arbitration, mediation, enforcement, and outbound compliance practice.

description.zh: 分为基础理论与专门问题，只展示题录、摘要和合法来源链接。
description.en: Bibliographic entries and summaries for foundational theory and specialized issues.

description.zh: 跟踪联合国、WTO、HCCH、UNCITRAL、WIPO等机构资料。
description.en: Materials from the UN, WTO, HCCH, UNCITRAL, WIPO, and related institutions.

description.zh: 领导讲话、集体学习、新闻通稿和政策发布报道。
description.en: Leadership speeches, study sessions, news releases, and policy announcements.

description.zh: 全国人大及其常委会制定的法律。
description.en: Laws enacted by the National People's Congress and its Standing Committee.

description.zh: 国务院行政法规、部门规章和规范性文件。
description.en: Administrative regulations, departmental rules, and normative documents.

description.zh: 司法解释、司法政策文件、司法协助和审判工作文件。
description.en: Judicial interpretations, judicial policy documents, assistance materials, and trial guidance.

description.zh: 典型案例、裁判规则和实践观察。
description.en: Typical cases, adjudicative rules, and practice notes.

description.zh: 官方数据库、平台和持续更新的资料入口。
description.en: Official databases, platforms, and continuously updated source gateways.

description.zh: 政府白皮书、年度报告和专题报告。
description.en: Government white papers, annual reports, and thematic reports.

description.zh: 中国参加、签署或需要重点跟踪的多边条约、公约和国际法律文书。
description.en: Multilateral treaties, conventions, and international legal instruments involving China or central to the research agenda.

description.zh: 学术文章、理论阐释和研究综述的题录资料。
description.en: Bibliographic records for scholarship, theory essays, and research reviews.

description.zh: 国际组织、公约机制和全球治理平台资料。
description.en: International organizations, convention mechanisms, and global governance platforms.

label.en: Theory of Foreign-Related Rule of Law

description.zh: 概念、体系定位、价值目标、方法论和知识体系。
description.en: Concepts, system position, values, methodology, and knowledge framework.

description.zh: 外商投资、对外贸易、自由贸易试验区和制度型开放。
description.en: Foreign investment, foreign trade, free trade zones, and institutional opening-up.

description.zh: 反制裁、反干涉、反长臂管辖和阻断制度。
description.en: Counter-sanctions, anti-interference, anti-long-arm jurisdiction, and blocking mechanisms.

description.zh: 涉外司法、仲裁、调解、司法协助和判决承认执行。
description.en: Adjudication, arbitration, mediation, judicial assistance, and recognition and enforcement.

description.zh: 出海企业的制裁、出口管制、数据、知识产权和劳工合规。
description.en: Sanctions, export control, data, IP, and labor compliance for outbound companies.

label.en: Cross-Border Data and Digital Rule of Law

description.zh: 数据跨境流动、数字贸易、网络安全和人工智能治理。
description.en: Cross-border data flows, digital trade, cybersecurity, and AI governance.

description.zh: 领事保护、海外投资权益、海外安全和法律服务链条。
description.en: Consular protection, overseas investment interests, security, and legal service chains.

description.zh: 涉外法治人才、涉外律师、仲裁员和复合型研究队伍建设。
description.en: Foreign-related legal talent, lawyers, arbitrators, and interdisciplinary research teams.

description.zh: 美国、欧盟、东盟、一带一路沿线和全球南方法律环境。
description.en: Legal environments in the United States, EU, ASEAN, Belt and Road jurisdictions, and the Global South.

description.zh: 国际组织、公约机制、全球治理规则和中国参与国际规则供给。
description.en: International organizations, convention mechanisms, global governance rules, and China's participation in rule supply.

description.zh: 按年份追踪讲话、政策、立法、条约、案例和国际组织动态。
description.en: A year-by-year view of speeches, policies, legislation, treaties, cases, and institutional developments.

description.zh: 建立中英文关键词、概念解释和交叉标签。
description.en: Bilingual keywords, concept notes, and cross-tags.

description.zh: 面向研究和实务的法律工具、清单和专题入口。
description.en: Legal tools, checklists, and thematic entry points for research and practice.

description.zh: 按机构整理中英文官方来源，标注可获得英文版的资料入口。
description.en: A source directory grouping official Chinese and English entry points by institution.

description.zh: 沉淀项目简报、专题报告、会议纪要和阶段成果。
description.en: Project briefs, thematic reports, meeting notes, and interim outputs.
